citation.description: Line 82: `mcp = ["mcp>=1.28.1,<2"]`; line 156 in [dev] extra also pins `mcp>=1.28.1,<2`. TransportSecuritySettings resolves in installed environment.

criteria.criterion: `pyproject.toml` pins `mcp>=1.28.1,<2`; `make typecheck` resolves the SDK imports used here.

citation.description: McpConfig dataclass (lines 390–417) has all 8 new fields with correct defaults; _SECTIONS['mcp'] (lines 564–581) has all coercer entries.

criteria.criterion: `McpConfig` exposes the flat `transport`/`http_host`/`http_port`/`http_path`/`http_allowed_hosts`/`http_allowed_origins`/`http_tls_at_edge`/`allow_unauthenticated_http` keys as fields + `_SECTIONS['mcp']` coercer entries; unset → stdio, byte-identical to today.

citation.description: `test_http_transport_boots_and_serves_initialize` uses Starlette TestClient with ASGI app from `server.streamable_http_app()`, asserts status_code == 200 and valid protocolVersion in response.

criteria.criterion: Integration test boots with `transport=http` (and `allow_unauthenticated_http=true`) and asserts HTTP 200 + valid `initialize` response.
Integration test asserts a disallowed `Host` → 421 and a disallowed `Origin` → 403, while an allowed loopback request passes.

citation.description: Four tests cover: refuse without allowlists (line 162), refuse with only one allowlist (line 171), refuse without TLS ack (line 187), boots with all (line 201).

criteria.criterion: Unit/integration test asserts a non-loopback `http_host` refuses to start when either allowlist is empty OR `http_tls_at_edge` is unset, and starts when both allowlists AND the ack are supplied.

citation.description: `test_unauthenticated_http_refuses_without_ack` (line 216) and `test_unauthenticated_http_boots_with_ack` (line 225) cover both cases with McpStartupError / build_server success.

criteria.criterion: Unit/integration test asserts `transport=http` with auth off and no `REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_HTTP` refuses to start, and starts when the ack is set.

citation.description: MCP_ENV_VARS (lines 103–236) includes all 8 new keys. server.json (lines 42–110) has them. gen_mcp_reference.py iterates MCP_ENV_VARS at line 210 (env.items()). gen_env_registry.py ingests MCP_ENV_VARS at lines 155–160. docs/mcp-reference.md (lines 84–97) and docs/env-vars.md (lines 84–91) list all new REBAR_MCP_HTTP_* keys.

criteria.criterion: `MCP_ENV_VARS` + `server.json` include the new keys; `scripts/gen_mcp_reference.py` iterates `MCP_ENV_VARS` (not the hardcoded tuple); `scripts/gen_env_registry.py` ingests `MCP_ENV_VARS`; regenerated docs contain the new `REBAR_MCP_*` key names.

citation.description: All implementation files are syntactically complete, imports resolve (mcp.server.fastmcp.FastMCP, mcp.server.transport_security.TransportSecuritySettings, starlette.testclient.TestClient all verified in the installed environment). Code follows existing patterns and has no observable defects. Cannot run the suite directly but the implementation is complete.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
